data.title: Tokyo Gas Revises Financial Forecasts Following Subsidiary Liquidation
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

TOKYO GAS Co ( (JP:9531) ) has issued an update.

Tokyo Gas Co., Ltd. has revised its financial forecast for the fiscal year ending March 2026, following the liquidation of its subsidiary, Tokyo Gas Australia Pty Ltd. This decision will result in a substantial gain from reversing the foreign currency translation adjustment, leading to an increase in the profit attributable to owners of the parent by 36.6% compared to previous forecasts.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9531) stock is a Hold with a Yen4950.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on TOKYO GAS Co stock, see the JP:9531 Stock Forecast page.

More about TOKYO GAS Co

Tokyo Gas Co., Ltd. operates in the energy sector, primarily focusing on the supply of natural gas and related services. The company is a significant player in the Japanese market, providing energy solutions and infrastructure for residential, commercial, and industrial clients.

Average Trading Volume: 1,755,339

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen1735.5B

data.title: Golden Mile Resources Completes Maiden Drilling at Pearl Copper Project
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Golden Mile Resources Ltd. ( (AU:G88) ) has provided an update.

Golden Mile Resources Ltd. has successfully completed its maiden drilling campaign at the Pearl Copper Project in Arizona, marking the first drilling at the Odyssey and Ford Prospects since 1942. The campaign intersected visible copper mineralization in multiple holes, indicating potential for high-grade copper deposits. This development represents a significant milestone for Golden Mile’s operations in the U.S., potentially enhancing its industry positioning and offering promising implications for stakeholders. Assay results are expected soon, which may confirm broader multi-element mineralization.

More about Golden Mile Resources Ltd.

Golden Mile Resources Ltd. is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. Their primary focus is on copper projects, with a significant market interest in high-grade copper deposits, particularly in the United States.

Average Trading Volume: 2,789,742

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$9.8M

Country Garden Holdings Co ( (HK:2007) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Country Garden Holdings Co announced an extension of the Early-Bird RSA Fee Deadline and General RSA Fee Deadline, allowing creditors more time to accede to the restructuring support agreement (RSA). This decision reflects the company’s ongoing efforts to manage its offshore indebtedness and indicates that many creditors are supportive of the proposed restructuring but are still undergoing internal approval processes.

data.title: Sweet Earth Holdings Announces $10 Million Private Placement
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Sweet Earth Holdings ( (TSE:SE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Sweet Earth Holdings Corporation announced a non-brokered private placement of unsecured convertible debentures for gross proceeds of $10 million from a strategic investor. The debentures, which bear interest at 5% per annum payable in Bitcoin, USDT, or Ethereum, are convertible into common shares at a price of $1.25 per share. The funds will be used for general working capital and expenditures related to a proposed transaction with Vesalius Longevity Labs. This move is expected to enhance Sweet Earth’s financial flexibility and support its strategic initiatives, potentially impacting its market position positively.

Spark’s Take on TSE:SE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:SE is a Underperform.

Sweet Earth Holdings faces significant financial instability with negative equity and persistent losses, posing high financial risks. Despite some technical strength and an attractive valuation, these factors are overshadowed by severe financial challenges and reliance on external funding. The recent private placement may provide short-term relief but does not address the underlying operational issues.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:SE stock, click here.

More about Sweet Earth Holdings

Sweet Earth Holdings Corporation is a reporting issuer in the Provinces of British Columbia, Alberta, and Ontario, with its common shares listed on the CSE. The company has been developing hemp and CBD-related assets in Canada and the United States and is actively seeking new and different business opportunities.

Average Trading Volume: 13,198

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Gorilla Gold Mines Expands Lakeview Prospect with Promising Drilling Results
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An update from Labyrinth Resources Limited ( (AU:GG8) ) is now available.

Gorilla Gold Mines Ltd has announced significant progress in its exploration efforts at the Lakeview Prospect within the Comet Vale Project. Recent drilling results have extended the King Kong gold lode by 100 meters at depth, revealing high-grade mineralization over a 600-meter strike and 350-meter depth, with potential for further expansion. The discovery of multiple parallel mineralized structures through soil sampling provides immediate targets for further exploration. The company plans to increase drilling activity with five rigs at Lakeview and continue efforts at the Mulwarrie Project, aiming for a resource update soon. These developments enhance Gorilla Gold’s position in the gold mining sector, promising substantial growth and opportunities for stakeholders.

More about Labyrinth Resources Limited

Gorilla Gold Mines Ltd (ASX: GG8) is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on gold exploration and development. The company is actively engaged in projects such as the Comet Vale Project, located near Kalgoorlie, Western Australia, where it is exploring and expanding its gold resources.

Average Trading Volume: 1,797,368

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$329.7M

data.title: HSBC Successfully Issues $2 Billion in Contingent Convertible Securities
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

HSBC Holdings ( (GB:HSBA) ) has shared an announcement.

HSBC Holdings plc announced the successful issuance of $2 billion in perpetual subordinated contingent convertible securities with a 7.050% interest rate. This issuance, which has been admitted to trading on Euronext Dublin, strengthens HSBC’s capital base and enhances its financial flexibility, potentially impacting its market positioning positively.

More about HSBC Holdings

HSBC Holdings plc is a leading global financial services company headquartered in London, United Kingdom. The company operates in the banking and financial services industry, offering a wide range of products and services including retail banking, wealth management, commercial banking, and global banking and markets. HSBC has a significant presence in Europe, Asia, the Americas, the Middle East, and Africa, focusing on serving customers worldwide with a strong emphasis on international connectivity.
